ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was started */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the task is expected to be completed */,
  "effort" REAL /* Estimated effort in hours */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the team member assigned to the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "role" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team member belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the team member was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member to whom the task is assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment (e.g., Assigned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effort_logs" (
  "effort_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effort log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task for which effort is logged */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member logging the effort */,
  "date_logged" TEXT /* Date when the effort was logged */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Hours spent on the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work performed */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task at the time of logging */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the effort log */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the effort log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effort_logs_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effort_logs_team_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effort_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project undergoing status change */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the project */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the notification */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task related to the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Delivered, Read) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role permission association */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role permission association was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role permission association */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role permission association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES team_members ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
